name_cn:
'Balenciaga Paris'
Lined with sheepskin 🐊🌌
The hourglass bag you asked for N times is here!
Balenciagα This season's heavy hitter Hourglass bag, unique iconic curved shape is highly recognizable, instantly eye-catching and super cool! Smooth surface, appearance presents a crescent moon shape, with a metal B-shaped ring, cowhide texture is also very impressive and full of style! Babies keep buying don't stop!!💕
23x10x24cm Model 2256
